---
title: "SQLREPL Minimal"
format: html
page-layout: full
toc: false
execute:
  enabled: false
filters:
  - sqlrepl/_extensions/sqlrepl/sqlrepl.lua
---


```{.sqlrepl lifecycle="beforeAll" envir="demo1"}
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS demotable;
CREATE TABLE demotable (id INT, name TEXT);
```

```{.sqlrepl lifecycle="beforeEach" envir="demo1"}
DELETE FROM demotable;
INSERT INTO demotable VALUES
  (1, 'Alice'),
  (2, 'Bob'),
  (3, 'Charlie'),
  (4, 'David'),
  (5, 'Emma'),
  (6, 'Frank'),
  (7, 'Grace'),
  (8, 'Hannah'),
  (9, 'Isaac'),
  (10, 'Julia'),
  (11, 'Kevin'),
  (12, 'Laura'),
  (13, 'Michael'),
  (14, 'Nina'),
  (15, 'Oliver'),
  (16, 'Paula'),
  (17, 'Quentin'),
  (18, 'Rachel'),
  (19, 'Sam'),
  (20, 'Tina'),
  (21, 'Umar'),
  (22, 'Victoria'),
  (23, 'William'),
  (24, 'Xenia'),
  (25, 'Yusuf'),
  (26, 'Zara'),
  (27, 'Adrian'),
  (28, 'Bianca'),
  (29, 'Cedric'),
  (30, 'Diana');
```

```{.sqlrepl lifecycle="main" envir="demo1"}

```
